---
id: api-meta-db-pool-retrieve
title: "api_meta_db_pool_retrieve"
description: "Return real-time database connection pool statistics for the default database alias.  Useful for detecting connection leaks or pool exhaustion.  **Admin access required.**"
sidebar_label: "api_meta_db_pool_retrieve"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/meta/db-pool/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Return real-time database connection pool statistics for the default database alias.  Useful for detecting connection leaks or pool exhaustion.  **Admin access required.**

</ParamsDetails>
